hero.headline: What if a dashboard took one prompt?
hero.subheadline: The panel on the right stays pinned while the story scrolls. Same beats as the hero film, in a page you can skim. Native scrolling only, nothing hijacked.

scrollStory.heading: It starts with one prompt
scrollStory.body: Type the dashboard you want in plain English. A slash command hands it to the agent. No tickets, no BI backlog, no SQL.

scrollStory.heading: Watch it actually build
scrollStory.body: xFalcon asks what a senior analyst would — fiscal calendar, segments, comparison basis — then reads your warehouse and writes the portal, file by file.

scrollStory.heading: A live portal, not a slide
scrollStory.body: Out comes the Falcon Finance portal: seven KPIs, trend and regional charts, ten drill-down modules. Real numbers, this week vs. the same week last year.

scrollStory.heading: Same dashboard. Two timelines.
scrollStory.body: What's normally a twelve-week BI project — scoping, modeling, dev backlog, rework — xFalcon ships in an afternoon.

features.title: Minutes, not months
features.body: A live analytics portal from a single slash command. No tickets, no BI backlog.

features.title: Your data warehouse
features.body: Connects directly to Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, and more — no ETL required.

features.title: Analyst-quality output
features.body: Asks the right clarifying questions, then writes production-grade SQL and components.

outro.headline: Falcon Finance is one of thirty plus.
outro.subheadline: Every demo on the wall started the same way - a single prompt. Same story the hero film tells, now guided and skimmable.
